title: senecio flavus
intro: Senecio flavus, also known as Yellow Ragwort, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Europe and parts of Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Senecio flavus is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it due to potential toxicity concerns.
